title: Digital Handshake
description: A personal portfolio website built with Next.js, React, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS — statically exported and powered by MDX content.

title: Memory Game
description: A card-matching memory game with flip animations. Find all 6 matching pairs in as few moves as possible.

title: Tic Tac Toe
description: Classic two-player game with move history and time travel. Built following the official React tutorial.

title: Calisthenics Progression
description: A Flask web application for tracking calisthenics workouts and exercise progressions.
